meta.description: Hypothesis tree for weekly grant review loop. Each root child is a mechanism family. Frontier = open/promising nodes only.

timeline.label: Timeline risk — deliverable slippage
timeline.summary: Which deliverable is most at risk of slipping past its due date?

budget.label: Budget risk — spend diverging from plan
budget.summary: Where is budget burn rate diverging from the award plan?

personnel.label: Personnel gap — under/over-resourced roles
personnel.summary: Who on the team is under-supported or has open deliverables without capacity?

science.label: Science gap — technical progress needed
science.summary: Which deliverable needs more technical progress (code, data, analysis, writing)?

reporting.label: Reporting gap — NSF reports coming due
reporting.summary: What NSF reporting requirement is coming up and how prepared are we?
